course.title: Linear Algebra Demo
course.subtitle: A seeded repository for local product testing

section.title: Vectors
section.paragraph: Vectors let us describe direction and magnitude in a compact way.
Edit this XML file to test full preview rebuilds without GitHub.
section.item: Represent vectors as ordered lists of numbers.
Use the preview to confirm text updates appear after rebuild.

section.title: Matrices
section.paragraph: Matrices organize coefficients so we can describe systems and transformations.
section.item: Use styles.css to test quick asset updates.
Use interactive.js to test JavaScript live preview updates.
